IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (18159866.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced IT leader with over two decades of experience in technology management, strategic planning, and project execution. Proven track record of delivering high-impact solutions that drive business growth and operational efficiency.
SKILLS: strategic planning and execution, business theory, business processes, management, budgeting, and business office operations, data processing, hardware platforms, enterprise software applications, and outsourced systems (including cloud SaaS and IaaS), computer systems characteristics, features, and integration capabilities, systems design and development from business requirements analysis through to day-to-day management, IT planning, organization, and development, project management principles, application of IT in solving business problems, applicable laws and regulations related to IT, human resource management principles, practices, and procedures, leadership
